narrative:
Beavercreek 090 (precinct in Greene County) has 632 registered voters, with 49.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.7 percentage points.
